Skeleton.stubNotice: This page is part of the Walking Skeleton. Live data appears once this module ships.

summary.title: Your organization at a glance
summary.subtitle: Live counts from Supabase, scoped to your organization via RLS.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your MES workspace

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link.
forgot.info: The link expires in 30 minutes. Check your spam folder if it does not arrive within 2 minutes.
forgot.successBody: We sent a reset link to the work email you provided. Follow the link to set a new password.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.subtitle: Enter the six-digit TOTP code from your authenticator app.

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

users_screen.title: Users & roles
users_screen.no_users_body: Try selecting a different role or invite someone new to this workspace.
users_screen.role_permissions_description: What each role can do across modules. Edit by clicking a cell.
users_screen.invite_help: They'll receive an email with a magic link. The link expires in 7 days.
users_screen.invalid_invite: Enter an email address and select a role before sending the invitation.
users_screen.load_error: Users could not be loaded. Try refreshing the settings users page.
users_screen.permission_denied: Permission denied: settings.users.view or settings.users.invite is required to view users and roles.
users_screen.role_assignment_subtitle: Pick a user, then the new role.
users_screen.role_assignment_preview: Assigning {role} to {user}. Previous role {previousRole} will be replaced.

features.title: Feature flags
features.subtitle: Turn modules and features on for your workspace.
features.dryRunTitle: Preview affected modules + active sessions before saving flag changes
features.planNotice: You're on the {planName}. All premium features are included. Beta features are released incrementally.
features.freePlanNotice: You're on the {planName}. Premium features require an upgrade. Beta features are released incrementally.
features.earlyAccessCopy: Want to try a feature early?
features.empty: No feature flags are configured for this workspace.
features.dependencyRejectedBody: This feature is required by dependent modules. Review the affected modules before force-disable.
features.dryRunAffects: Activating this flag set affects {modules} modules across {sessions} active sessions.
features.dryRunApplyOnLoad: flags currently on. Changes apply on next page load for each user.

security_screen.title: Security
security_screen.subtitle: Authentication, session, and password policy.
security_screen.enforce_admins_hint: Admin accounts must use an authenticator app.
security_screen.password_expires_hint: Force rotation every N days. Not recommended by NIST.
security_screen.block_reuse: Block reuse of last N passwords
security_screen.enforce_sso_hint: Password login disabled for non-admin users when on.
security_screen.ip_allowlist_hint: Restrict admin login to specific IPs or ranges.
security_screen.add_ip_range_help: Add a CIDR range for administrator sign-in.
security_screen.permission_denied: You do not have permission to manage security settings.

audit_log_viewer.title: Audit logs
audit_log_viewer.summary: Full audit trail of all settings mutations. Partitioned monthly, retained 7 years. Org-scoped to your tenant only.
audit_log_viewer.org_notice_suffix: (your org). Cross-tenant viewing requires impersonate.tenant — not granted to your role.
audit_log_viewer.large_date_range_body: {days} days span ~{partitions} monthly partitions. Query may take longer.
audit_log_viewer.load_error: Unable to load audit log entries.
audit_log_viewer.empty: No audit log entries for selected filters.
audit_log_viewer.forbidden_message: Access denied for org_id-scoped audit logs. Required permission: {reason}.
audit_log_viewer.forbidden_role_codes: Role codes are not treated as permissions; cross-tenant viewing additionally requires the impersonation permission.

authorization.auditReasonPlaceholder: Describe why these authorization settings are changing
authorization.approvalPermissionHint: Fixed permission string used by the Technical gate.
authorization.approverRolesHint: Roles selected by the authorization policy row.
authorization.authorizePermissionHint: Fixed permission string required to approve a request.
authorization.authorizedRolesHint: Roles selected by T-126 policy data.
authorization.blockerApproverRoleMissing: Select at least one approver role
authorization.blockerAuthorizerRoleMissing: Select at least one authorized role
authorization.blockerGateRuleMissing: Technical approval gate rule is missing
authorization.blockerMinApproversInvalid: Minimum approvers must be at least 1
authorization.blockerRequiresNewVersionRequired: requires_new_version must remain true for released-product edits
authorization.blockerSelfAuthorization: Requester and authorizer must be different users
authorization.errorBody: Authorization policies could not be loaded. Refresh and try again.
authorization.invariantBanner: Authorized edits always create a new BOM/product-spec version; in-place mutation is never allowed. Factory-use approval remains locked until Technical signs off.
authorization.minimumAuthorizersHint: T-126 validates blockers and segregation of duties on save.
authorization.missingSeedBody: Required org_authorization_policies rows are absent. Seed these policy codes before editing settings:
authorization.npdDescription: Authorizes released product/BOM edit requests after NPD release.
authorization.pageSubtitle: Control who can request released product/BOM edits and technical approval gates.
authorization.readOnlyNotice: Read-only: settings.authorization.edit is required to change authorization policies.
authorization.requestPermissionHint: Fixed permission string used by workflows.
authorization.technicalDescription: Blocks production/factory use until Technical approval is recorded.
authorization.heading: Authorization Policies

manufacturing_operations.title: Manufacturing Operations
manufacturing_operations.subtitle: Configure tenant-specific operation names, process suffixes, industry seed sets, active state, and recipe sequence order.
manufacturing_operations.notice: Operations are referenced by routings, line assignments, and WIP code generators. The process suffix is immutable after creation.
manufacturing_operations.permission_denied: You do not have permission to manage manufacturing operations.
manufacturing_operations.empty: No manufacturing operations match the current filters.
manufacturing_operations.reset_dialog_body: This will replace all current operations with the selected industry seed data. Existing operation order, suffixes, and inactive rows will be reset.

company_profile.title: Company profile
company_profile.subtitle: Your company details, used across labels, invoices, and exports.
company_profile.empty: No organization profile is available for the current org.
company_profile.load_error: Company profile could not be loaded.
company_profile.save_error: Company profile could not be saved.
company_profile.read_only_notice: You need settings.org.update to save company profile changes.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: When and how the system sends alerts.
notifications.channelsSubtitle: Outbound channels the system can use.
notifications.inAppHint: Shown at the top of the UI.
notifications.smsHint: Via Twilio — only used for critical alerts.
notifications.slackHint: Post alerts to a Slack channel.
notifications.monthlyComplianceReportHint: Sent to Admins on the 1st of each month.
notifications.empty: No notification rules are configured yet.

import_export.title: Import / Export
import_export.subtitle: Bulk import and export for Settings entities. Imports are audited, permission-gated, and fail closed for unsupported entities.
import_export.permission_denied: You do not have permission to view Settings import/export entities.

states.loading: Loading import/export jobs and entity configuration…
states.empty: No import or export jobs yet.

alerts.unsupported_import: {entity} is export-only; import is unsupported for this Settings entity. Use export for audit-safe reads.
alerts.authorization_policy: Authorization policies import requires settings.authorization.edit, audit reason, and successful T-122 dry-run. V-SET-43/V-SET-44 cannot be bypassed by CSV import.

import_card.title: Import Settings entities
import_card.description: Upload CSV files, download templates, and route specialized imports through their owned preview flows.
import_card.async_job: Async job — you will be notified
import_card.dropzone: Drag and drop CSV or click to browse
import_card.audit_reason_placeholder: Explain why authorization policy CSV changes are being validated.
import_card.csv_required: CSV file is required before T-122 dry-run.
import_card.audit_reason_required: Audit reason is required before authorization policy import.
import_card.dedicated_flow_required: This Settings entity requires its dedicated preview/commit flow before import can proceed.
import_card.preflight_unavailable: T-122 preflight service is not configured for this environment.

export_card.title: Export Settings entities
export_card.description: Read-only exports use the selected global Settings entity and requested output format.

jobs.title: Recent jobs
jobs.description: Last 30 days. Statuses link every import/export action to audit evidence.

common.body: This page intentionally avoids mock business data. It proves the sidebar link resolves under the localized AppShell; the full business screen lands in its owning module wave.

shifts.title: Shifts & calendar
shifts.description: Shift pattern and non-production calendar route is connected; the OEE/production wave owns the full scheduling editor.

products.title: Products & SKUs
products.description: Product and SKU route is connected; the Technical module wave owns the full item list and product master workflow.

boms.title: BOMs & recipes
boms.description: BOM and recipe route is connected; the Technical module wave owns the versioned BOM list and recipe workflow.

processes.title: Processes
processes.description: Process configuration route is connected; the production/technical module waves own the detailed process setup screens.

partners.title: Suppliers & customers
partners.description: Partner master-data route is connected; supplier and customer screens land in their domain waves.

devices.title: Scanner devices
devices.description: Scanner device administration route is connected; scanner production work remains isolated from the desktop scanner shell.

labels.title: Label templates
labels.description: Label template route is connected; document-template editing lands in the labels/document wave.

onboarding.title: Onboarding wizard
onboarding.description: Onboarding route is connected; setup flow screens remain available while the full admin wizard is wired.
onboarding.panelDescription: Launch or resume the guided setup wizard. Progress below reflects your organization's real onboarding state.

d365_dlq.title: D365 DLQ
d365_dlq.description: D365 dead-letter route is connected; shipping/export exception handling lands in the integration wave.

ship_override_reasons.title: Shipping override reasons
ship_override_reasons.description: Shipping override reason route is connected; rule/reference maintenance lands in the shipping/settings wave.

gallery.title: Modal gallery
gallery.description: Modal gallery route is connected for design-system verification and future QA evidence.

users.heading: Users & roles
users.error_load: Users could not be loaded. Try refreshing the settings users page.
users.permission_denied: Permission denied: settings.users.manage is required to manage users and roles.

onboarding.wizard_subtitle: 6-step setup · target <15 minutes · state saved automatically (organizations.onboarding_state). {percent}% complete.
onboarding.in_progress_body: Your organization setup is still being completed. An administrator must finish onboarding before this workspace is available.
onboarding.error_load: Couldn't load onboarding profile. The saved wizard state remains unchanged.
onboarding.permission_denied: Permission denied: settings.onboarding.write is required to continue onboarding.
onboarding.gs1_required: GS1 Company Prefix is required for SSCC generation
onboarding.save_failed: Organization profile could not be saved.

deptClose.subtitle: FA {faCode} · {productName}
deptClose.allPassBanner: All required fields filled — safe to close.
deptClose.cannotCloseBanner: Cannot close: fill all required fields before closing this section.
deptClose.notePlaceholder: Add a comment for the audit trail…
deptClose.noteTooShort: The closing note must be at least 10 characters.
deptClose.empty: No required fields configured for this department.
deptClose.error: Unable to load the required-field checklist. Try again.
deptClose.forbidden: You do not have permission to close this department.

faList.title: Factory Articles
faList.subtitle: All FAs · filter by status or department
faList.empty: No Factory Articles match your filters
faList.emptyBody: Factory Articles are the master NPD record created from a converted Brief. Create one or clear filters.
faList.error: Unable to load Factory Articles. Try again after the backend is available.
faList.forbidden: You do not have permission to view Factory Articles.

briefList.title: NPD Briefs
briefList.subtitle: Briefs are pre-FA intake
briefList.searchPlaceholder: Search brief name or dev code…
briefList.emptyBody: Briefs are pre-FA intake records. Start a new one or clear your filters to see existing briefs.
briefList.error: Unable to load briefs. Try again after the backend is available.
briefList.forbidden: You do not have permission to view briefs.

nutrition.title: Nutrition declaration (per 100g)
nutrition.subtitle: Computed per-100g + per-portion values
nutrition.generateLabelDisabledHint: Label PDF export is not yet available (deferred)
nutrition.emptyBody: Nutrition values are computed once the formulation is complete.
nutrition.forbidden: You do not have permission to view nutrition data.

costing.title: Cost breakdown
costing.subtitle: Waterfall from raw materials to final cost per kg
costing.marginWarnBody: At target price, margin is {marginPct}% — below the NPD minimum of {threshold}%.
costing.hardFailBody: Scenario "{name}" has a negative margin ({marginPct}%) and cannot be saved.
costing.saveError: Could not save the scenario. Try again.
costing.emptyBody: Costing is computed once the formulation has ingredient costs.
costing.forbidden: You do not have permission to view costing data.

risks.title: Risk register
risks.subtitle: Score = Likelihood × Impact (1=Low, 2=Med, 3=High).
risks.builtBlockedBody: An open High-severity risk blocks this FA from being built. Mitigate or close it first.
risks.emptyBody: Track risks to launch: likelihood × impact. Add a risk to capture mitigation owner and status.
risks.error: Unable to load risks. Try again after the backend is available.
risks.forbidden: You do not have permission to view risks for this FA.
risks.fieldDescriptionHint: Max 300 chars. Describe the risk and business impact.
risks.fieldReasonHint: Required for lifecycle changes — min 10 chars.
risks.errorReasonShort: Reason must be at least 10 characters.

compliance.title: Compliance documents
compliance.subtitle: Read-only attachments tied to this Factory Article.
compliance.emptyBody: Upload the compliance artefacts tied to this FA (specs, certificates, CoA). PDF, XLSX, DOCX up to 20 MB.
compliance.error: Unable to load compliance documents. Try again after the backend is available.
compliance.forbidden: You do not have permission to view compliance documents for this FA.
compliance.fileTypesNote: File types: PDF, XLSX, DOCX. Max 20 MB per upload. Documents nearing expiry are flagged automatically.
compliance.fieldExpiresHint: Optional. Documents are flagged 30 days before this date.
compliance.errorTitleRequired: Title must be at least 3 characters.
compliance.errorTitleTooLong: Title must be at most 300 characters.
compliance.errorFileType: Unsupported file type. Use PDF, XLSX or DOCX.

faCreate.title: Create factory article
faCreate.subtitle: V01 · FA Code format validated as you type. V02 · Product Name is required.
faCreate.fieldProductCodeHint: Must start with 'FA' followed by uppercase letters/digits (e.g. FA5609).
faCreate.rangeHint: On success you will be taken to the new FA. Codes FA5600+ are reserved for the 2026 NPD pipeline.
faCreate.errorV01: FA Code must start with 'FA' followed by uppercase letters/digits (e.g. FA5609).
faCreate.errorDuplicate: That FA Code already exists. Choose a different code.
faCreate.errorGeneric: Could not create the factory article. Try again.

faHistory.title: History
faHistory.subtitle: Read-only timeline of every change to this Factory Article.
faHistory.emptyBody: Changes to this Factory Article will appear here as they happen.
faHistory.emptyFilteredBody: Try a different event type or clear the filter.
faHistory.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this FA history.
faHistory.eventCount: {count, plural, =0 {No events} one {# event} other {# events}}

dashboard.alertsSubtitle: Sorted by days left, soonest first
dashboard.emptyBody: Launch alerts appear once Factory Articles are created from a Brief.
dashboard.error: Unable to load the dashboard. Try again once the backend is available.
dashboard.forbidden: You do not have permission to view the NPD dashboard.
dashboard.legendNote: Row-level alert badges recalculate on each load.
dashboard.legendRed: Launch ≤ 10 days, or missing required fields
dashboard.subtitle: Pipeline overview across 7 departments
dashboard.title: NPD Dashboard

briefDetail.convertedNotice: This brief has been converted to {fa}. It is now read-only.
briefDetail.saveError: Could not save the draft. Try again.
briefDetail.completeError: Could not complete the brief. Try again.
briefDetail.weightMismatchBody: Component weights ({total}g) differ from the target total by more than tolerance. Adjust before completing.
briefDetail.packagingExtBody: Fields C21-C37 (sleeve artwork, lamination, gas mix, pallet config, retailer labelling) are pending the Phase B.2 Brief schema rescan. Rendered inline but not yet mapped.
briefDetail.emptyBody: This brief does not exist or you do not have access to it.
briefDetail.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this brief.

pipelineKanban.title: Pipeline
pipelineKanban.subtitle: Stage-Gate pipeline — projects by gate
pipelineKanban.emptyBody: Start a new Stage-Gate project to populate the board.
pipelineKanban.error: Unable to load the pipeline. Try again after the backend is available.
pipelineKanban.forbidden: You do not have permission to view the pipeline.
pipelineKanban.advanceError: Could not advance the project. The change was reverted.
pipelineKanban.adjacencyError: Projects can only advance to the next gate. The change was reverted.

formulationEditor.title: Recipe
formulationEditor.subtitle: Edit any % or cost — nutrition, allergens, and margin recalculate live.
formulationEditor.saveError: Could not save the draft. Try again.
formulationEditor.totalPctWarning: Ingredient total is {pct}%. Adjust to exactly 100% before submitting for trial.
formulationEditor.livePanelsHint: Cost, nutrition and allergen panels appear here.
formulationEditor.emptyBody: Create a draft version to start formulating.
formulationEditor.forbidden: You do not have permission to edit this formulation.
formulationEditor.locked: This version is locked and cannot be edited.
